data.summary: Built meeting brief for Magnolia Home & Garden. Pulled CRM activity, recent orders, open quotes, and outstanding tasks.

steps.result: Next meeting: Tomorrow 10:00 AM, video call
3 open orders, 2 open quotes, 3 open tasks

fields.label: Stated Agenda
fields.value: July 2026 pre-book review + Spring refill quote approval

highlights.message: Lead with this — top account YTD, up 18% over last year
July pre-book window closes soon — push for quantity commitment today

items.title: YTD revenue up 18% — strongest account in Beth's Southeast territory
A Blooming Porch and Gardeners Grove are their top-selling collections — new Spring SKUs just landed
July 2026 Virtual Release pre-book — Pick Of The Patch and new garden line available for pre-order
Spring refill quote ($28,400) pending approval — expires in 6 days
15 PhaseOut SKUs from sale_clearance bucket — offer clearance pricing to clear inventory
Order ORD-A8012 delivered ($14,200, A Blooming Porch SKUs)
Quote Q-8801 sent — $28,400 Spring refill, expires May 26
Quote Q-8802 sent — $14,200 Gardeners Grove restock
Task: Confirm July pre-book quantities — overdue since May 15
Email: Jennifer asked about Herb Garden availability for Fall

closingText.text: Here's your prep for tomorrow's 10 AM with Jennifer. Lead with the 18% YTD growth — she'll appreciate the recognition. The July pre-book is the priority: Pick Of The Patch and the new garden line are strong fits for her store. The Spring refill quote ($28,400) expires in 6 days — push for approval in the meeting. Want me to draft a pre-meeting confirmation email or pull up the July pre-book catalog?
